reference_answer: Depot custodian Orin Vale held custody of the violin case.
Clerk Mina Holt filed lost-property register LR-50 on 2026-07-01.
SN-50 recommended letting the claimant inspect the case at the depot desk.
DR-50 stayed draft pending the review board vote.
Transit property rule TP-7 governed instruments.
CO-50 authorized release only after the claimant signed receipt form RF-50.
CF-50 said Orin Vale remained custody holder until RF-50 was signed and CO-50 controlled release after that signature.
KN-50 was noncontrolling because it copied DR-50 and omitted the later board vote and CF-50.
